heading: Carpenter Rocks vs Carrickalinga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carpenter Rocks, South Australia and Carrickalinga, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carpenter Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Carrickalinga (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carpenter Rocks or Carrickalinga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carpenter Rocks has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Carrickalinga scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carpenter Rocks scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Carrickalinga scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carpenter Rocks or Carrickalinga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carpenter Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
